evidence.snippet: Equipmake has developed a custom direct-drive SPM motor and IGBT inverter system for Vertical Aerospace’s pioneering electric Vertical Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft.
Equipmake collaborated with Swiss electric aviation specialist H55 to develop a bespoke SPM motor designed for direct drive of a light aircraft propeller.

Electric motor design & development
Years of development in the field of permanent magnet motors has resulted in Equipmake developing motors with class leading power densities of 9kW/kg.

items.notes: Core product line is electric motors including aerospace-grade motors for eVTOL (Vertical Aerospace EPU) and electric aircraft (H55/BRM Bristell B23 Energic). APM-200, AMPERE-220, HTM-3500 are catalog motors.

evidence.snippet: Each EPU integrates a lightweight, high-power electric motor with a high-performance inverter, developed and manufactured entirely in-house.

*   Technology: Silicon Carbide (SiC)
*   Typical Fsw: 40 kHz

items.notes: Inverter/motor controller products HPI-450 and HPI-800; also supplies SiC inverters integrated into EPUs for aerospace customers (Gilmour Space, Vertical Aerospace).

Equipmake’s advanced Electric Propulsion Unit (EPU) was deployed in Vertical Aerospace’s prototype during its first successful untethered flight test, marking Equipmake’s entry into the rapidly expanding eVTOL market.
EQUIPMAKE SIGNS AEROSPACE ELECTRIC MOTOR PRODUCTION SUPPLY AGREEMENT WITH H55

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is ground EV drivetrains (buses), but they supply electric motors, inverters, and integrated EPUs (Electric Propulsion Units) as components/modules for eVTOL and electric aircraft OEMs. The Vertical Aerospace EPU (motor+inverter) is more of a propulsion subsystem, but their standard product catalog is components.

items.name: H55 Aerospace Motor
items.product_type: bespoke SPM motor for direct-drive light aircraft propulsion (BRM Bristell B23 Energic)

evidence.snippet:
Equipmake collaborated with Swiss electric aviation specialist H55 to develop a bespoke SPM motor designed for direct drive of a light aircraft propeller.
    The motor features a dual power lane, fault-tolerant architecture with magnetic, thermal, and galvanic isolation between electrical supplies ensuring the highest levels of safety and reliability in the air.

products.notes: Standard catalog includes electric motors and inverters applicable to aerospace/UXV propulsion; also has custom project-specific EPUs for eVTOL and light aircraft. Bus products (Jewel E, EVR-B5, etc.) are named products but not UXV-relevant.

ndaa.notes: UK-based company; no NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claims anywhere in corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS claims found in corpus.

evidence.snippet: EQUIPMAKE SIGNS AEROSPACE ELECTRIC MOTOR PRODUCTION SUPPLY AGREEMENT WITH H55

Equipmake developed a bespoke 20,000 rpm onboard application motor and inverter solution. Five systems are required per vehicle, demonstrating Equipmake’s crucial role in advancing spaceflight technology. A total of 21 units were produced and delivered, with the first launch imminent.

readiness.notes: Production supply agreement signed with H55 for certified electric aircraft motors; 21 units delivered to Gilmour Space; serial fleet orders for bus drivetrains confirm full production capability.

unresolved_questions: Primary business is ground EV drivetrains (buses); UXV/aerospace involvement is secondary vertical — role confidence is medium rather than high.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance information available (UK company, not likely applicable).

fetch_requests.reason: Aerospace industry page likely details Equipmake's eVTOL and electric aviation product range, helping confirm UXV-specific propulsion subsystem products and supply chain role.
fetch_requests.source_hint: guessed from site nav (listed as Aerospace under Industries)

tagline: UK-based electric motor and power electronics supplier serving aerospace, automotive, and heavy commercial vehicle platforms. Core products include the APM-200 (220 kW liquid-cooled traction motor with integral gearbox, in low-rate production), AMPERE-220 (3D-printed 220 kW motor, prototype), HPI-450 (IGBT motor controller, low-rate production), and HPI-800 (SiC controller, prototype). Also supplies bespoke propulsion units to Vertical Aerospace eVTOL and Gilmour Space launch vehicles. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public record on US defense integration is sparse.
